label: PASS
rationale: ACE_Set_Enabled was successfully changed to Anybody, and Admin SP preconfig uses that ACE for Authority Set on Enabled; an unauthenticated session therefore may set Authority_Makers.Enabled.

label: FAIL
rationale: After ACE_Set_Enabled was personalized to Anybody, the Authority_Makers.Enabled Set should be authorized; NOT_AUTHORIZED contradicts the ACE and Admin SP method preconfiguration.

label: PASS
rationale: ACE_Set_Enabled was changed to Makers, but the final session has no MakerSymK or MakerPuK authentication; an Anybody-only session does not satisfy the Makers class ACE.

label: FAIL
rationale: With ACE_Set_Enabled set to Makers and no maker authority authenticated in the final session, Authority_Makers.Enabled Set should be NOT_AUTHORIZED, not SUCCESS.

label: PASS
rationale: MakerPuK is an individual member of Makers, and class authorities are authenticated when a member is authenticated; the successful MakerPuK session satisfies the Makers ACE for the Enabled Set.

label: FAIL
rationale: The final session successfully authenticated MakerPuK, which belongs to Makers; since ACE_Set_Enabled requires Makers, NOT_AUTHORIZED is inconsistent with class membership authentication.

label: PASS
rationale: MakerSymK is an individual member of Makers, and authenticating a member authenticates the class for that session; the Makers ACE therefore authorizes the Authority_Makers.Enabled Set.

label: FAIL
rationale: The final session successfully authenticated MakerSymK, a member of Makers, so the Makers ACE should authorize the Enabled Set; NOT_AUTHORIZED is not protocol-compliant.
